  в–ҳв–ҳ в–қв–қ    @terminal-agent В· ~/вҖҰ/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget

вқҜ [System] Your terminal identity has been set. widgetId=agent-rgm807 
  displayName=honey-crane canvasId=examples/new 
  configFile=.storyboard/terminals/agent-rgm807.json serverUrl=http://localhost:1236 вҖ” 
  this is a configuration step, no response needed.
